notes: Cumulative investment for ~49% economic stake in OpenAI capped-profit LLC (2019/2021/2023 tranches). Microsoft is exclusive cloud provider; all OpenAI workloads run on Azure. Revenue share until investment is recouped.
Annual Azure cloud compute provisioned to OpenAI; scales with model training and inference usage. OpenAI exclusively runs on Azure infrastructure.
Multi-year GPU compute through 2029: initial $11.9B (Mar 2025) + $4B expansion (May 2025) + $6.5B (Sep 2025). CoreWeave used SPV borrowing $2.6B against committed revenue to finance GPUs.
Phase 1 Stargate OCI compute. Oracle operates 131k-GPU zettascale cluster in Texas for OpenAI. Part of original $500B Stargate pledge despite JV governance disputes.
Separate 5-yr bilateral deal announced Jun 2025 starting 2027 — bypasses stalled Stargate JV. Largest single cloud compute commitment in history per Oracle SEC filing Jun 2025.
7-yr contract (2025-2031) for NVIDIA GB200/GB300 GPU access on Amazon EC2 UltraServers. Provides compute redundancy outside Azure/CoreWeave.
10-yr custom AI ASIC chip development and supply commitment ($350B over 2025-2035). OpenAI diversifying compute supply beyond NVIDIA GPUs. Largest single commitment in this dataset.
NVIDIA invests up to $100B in OpenAI as part of strategic alliance to deploy 10GW of AI processing capacity online H2 2026. NVIDIA struck similar alliance with xAI.
H100/H200/Blackwell GPU clusters for Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) and Stargate Texas sites.
Estimated cumulative GPU purchases; NVIDIA holds ~7% equity stake in CoreWeave and agreed to buy $6.3B of CoreWeave cloud services. CoreWeave is NVIDIA's single largest neocloud customer.
Azure AI GPU buildout across 60+ regions (H100/H200 clusters). Powers Azure OpenAI Service and Microsoft Copilot backend.
AWS GPU fleet for EC2 P/Trn instances; Amazon also deploys custom Trainium/Inferentia chips for ~30% of inference workloads.
Grok model training and inference on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure. Oracle provides overflow compute beyond xAI's own Memphis Colossus cluster.
Memphis Colossus Phase 1: ~100k H100 GPUs x ~$30k = ~$3B. Phase 2 targeting 200k-1M GPUs total. Vertical integration — xAI owns chips and power.
$14.2B compute deal through 2031. CoreWeave's largest single customer deal by dollar value. Powers Meta AI / Llama training and inference.
Strategic equity stake acquired around CoreWeave IPO (CRWV Mar 2025). Microsoft is CoreWeave's largest customer (~35% of 2024 revenue).
Equity stake + AWS compute credits; Anthropic runs exclusively on AWS. Amazon Trainium/Inferentia chips used for model training. Anthropic models available on Amazon Bedrock.
Strategic investment in Abu Dhabi sovereign AI firm G42. Drives Middle East AI expansion with Azure cloud integration. Part of Microsoft's sovereign AI strategy.
Cross-cloud colocation and networking agreements between Oracle Cloud and CoreWeave infrastructure.
